name: What's the deadline to report my work-related hearing loss in Boise? I'm freaking out I waited too long.

mainEntity.name: What's the deadline to report my work-related hearing loss in Boise? I'm freaking out I waited too long.

acceptedAnswer.text: Report immediately to employer with medical proof; no fixed deadline but delays weaken your case under Idaho law.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: In Idaho, report occupational diseases like hearing loss as soon as practicable, ideally immediately upon diagnosis, with no strict 180-day rule like Utah but prove it arose from employment.[2] Workers must prove the disease was incurred in the course of employment by preponderance of evidence.[2] Key factors: Gather medical records showing work causation; employer can't easily dismiss if on-the-job; delays make proof harder.[2] Notify your employer in writing now, seek authorized medical care, and file a claim promptly to avoid evidentiary issues. A local attorney can help navigate Idaho's Industrial Commission.

description: Report immediately to employer with medical proof; no fixed deadline but delays weaken your case under Idaho law.[2]
